title: We tested dozens of free CarPlay apps, here are the best ones - Engadget
summary: Google Maps was one of the most useful CarPlay apps when they first arrived, and it remains one of the best navigation options around. If you're a heavy Spotify user, you'll definitely want to use its CarPlay app.
